message:
chore(gitignore): forbid per-bead progress reports at repo root

After moving 27 progress and bd-keyed markdown files into docs/progress/,
add explicit ignore entries so the same drift cannot recur. New patterns:

- /progress.md: catch-all top-level progress log
- /progress_bd-*.md: per-bead progress logs (the dominant pattern)
- /bd-*.md: raw bead-numbered planning docs

The leading slash anchors each pattern to the repo root only — markdown
files with the same names under docs/progress/ remain tracked, which is
the desired behaviour.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -291,3 +291,8 @@ heaptrack.*.zst
 
 # Beads recovery artifacts (timestamped directories at repo root)
 .beads.recovery_*/
+
+# Per-bead progress reports — belong under docs/progress/, not repo root
+/progress.md
+/progress_bd-*.md
+/bd-*.md
